message:
feat(storage): tick 141 maintenance cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twentieth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 6 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the database-maintenance cluster.

New siblings:
- retention_cleanup_with_cx (composite; cx-threads both prune_segments
  _before_with_cx and record_maintenance_with_cx)
- aggregate_daily_metrics_with_cx (read path)
- aggregate_by_agent_with_cx (read path)
- vacuum_with_cx (write path)
- checkpoint_with_cx (write path)
- database_page_stats_with_cx (read path)

All leaf siblings do a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` then delegate.
The `retention_cleanup_with_cx` composite additionally routes its
inner prune + maintenance-log writes through their cx-first siblings
so the whole composite honours cancellation.

Test: `storage_tick141_maintenance_cluster_roundtrip` drives all 6
siblings on a fresh DB — vacuum → checkpoint → page_stats → daily
aggregate (empty) → per-agent aggregate (empty) → retention cleanup
(0 deleted, composite still logs maintenance event). Verified via
fork bypass: 488/488 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 91 + 6 = 97 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 43 legacy methods still lack a sibling; maintenance
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
